description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, slightly tapered black body and a large touchscreen display dominating the front. The front screen shows a detailed interface with app icons, a weather widget, and notification bar, indicating it is powered on and in use. The back is plain black with a subtle circular marking near the bottom, and no visible branding or camera modules. The sides are slim, with one side featuring a single elongated button, likely for power or volume control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and glass, with a sleek, smooth finish. Its compact size and lightweight build make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek black smartphone with a large touchscreen display, minimalistic back, and a single side button. The front is active with app icons and a weather widget visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the active touchscreen display with app icons, weather widget, and notification bar.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and a single elongated button on the left edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain black surface with a subtle circular marking near the bottom and no visible camera or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a slim edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a weather widget for Atlanta, GA, app icons (Contacts, Messages, Play Store, Google, Camera, etc.), a notification bar with time, battery, and signal indicators, and a background image of icebergs and water.
attribute_camera_placement: None visible on any side; no camera modules or lenses apparent.
attribute_button_layout: One elongated physical button on the left edge, likely for power or volume control; a circular home button below the screen on the front.
